basic_details.job_title: Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice)- Apply Offline for Deputy Secretary, Audit Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sangeet Natak Akademi Deputy Secretary, Audit Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website sangeetnatak.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Sangeet Natak Akademi Deputy Secretary, Audit Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Deputy Secretary (Administration): Applications are invited for filling up posts by transfer on deputation basis for a period of three years. Minimum qualification is graduate. Deputy Secretary (Finance & Accounts): Applications are invited for filling up posts by transfer on deputation basis for a period of three years. Minimum qualification is graduate. Audit Officer: Applications are invited for filling up posts by transfer on deputation basis for a period of three years. Minimum qualification is graduate.

selection_process: Applications through proper channel along with Vigilance Clearance and ACRS/APARs for the last 5 years.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sangeet Natak Akademi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sangeetnatak.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sangeet Natak Akademi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Sangeet Natak Akademi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Sangeet Natak Akademi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Applications through proper channel along with Vigilance Clearance and ACRS/APARs for the last 5 years.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Sangeet Natak Akademi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.sangeetnatak.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026 is 31 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Deputy Secretary and Audit Officer in the Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to send their applications through post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Deputy Secretary and Audit Officer posts is a graduate degree.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Secretary posts?
faq.answer: The Deputy Secretary posts are offered a salary in Pay Level-11.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Audit Officer post?
faq.answer: The Audit Officer post is offered a salary in Pay Level-7.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Sangeet Natak Akademi recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is deputation for a period of three years.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Sangeet Natak Akademi located?
faq.answer: Sangeet Natak Akademi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required along with the application?
faq.answer: Along with the application, candidates must submit Vigilance Clearance and ACRS/APARs for the last 5 years.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Online applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026 is 31 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.
